claim: For the characteristic-five affine-square family and received line R_gamma=X^(2B)+gamma X^(2B-1), the exact 2B-support MCA witness incidence has the audited pairwise slope-disjoint j-partition, exact census and representation moments, reciprocal per-slope covering optimum, phase root, inclusive 500j>=447B band, and conditional direct-partition lower bounds.
nonclaims: no semantic C1-C9 primitive or survival theorem
no row-uniform theorem over arbitrary received lines
no universal direct or semantic weighting impossibility

no Grand MCA hard input, Grand MCA, or Grand List theorem
remaining_wall: Prove a source-valid image-scale theorem for every actual primitive semantic first-match cell, then add the same-line budgets disjointly without interchanging sup_line sum_lambda with sum_lambda sup_line.
